raw_consumer_statement: I filed a police report because someone stole my identity and used information to obtain a credit card from Citi XXXX ( my account ) sent their address. They proceeded to make fraudulent charges. I called Citi XXXX about these fraudulent charges. I spoke with XXXX from the Executive Office on XXXX. The fraudulent charges were supposed to be removed. I also requested to have Citi statements from the year of XXXX  and XXXX. XXXX stated she will email me the statements. I never got an email, and I keep getting calls from Citi to make a payment. Despite these charges being done by another person. I have been a victim of identity theft. This is causing a negative impact on my credit report.
